name: John's Sesame Noodles (Caprial)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stockpot over high heat, bring 4 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Add the noodles and cook for 4 to 5 minutes, until they are al dente.
3. Drain the noodles into a serving bowl and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, garlic, hot pepper flakes, sesame oil, and vegetable oil until well blended.
5. Pour the mixture over the noodles. Serve warm or at room temperature.
[per serving: Calories, 292; protein, 4 grams; carbohydrates, 23 grams; fat, 21 grams; cholesterol, none; sodium, 511 milligrams]
